one_time_description: Trust settlement income of $7,490,358 recognized in 2024 (2023: $3,726,052), related to Treaty/surrender claim settlement
economic_notes: GBEs include Waywayseecappo Construction Corporation, Waywayseecappo Elton Gas Bar Corporation, Waywayseecappo Development Corporation, Waywayseecappo Gas Bar, KRW Limited Partnership, Anishinaabe Network Solutions Inc., and Wayway Land Holding Corporation. Combined GBE revenue ~$35.3M, earnings ~$1.05M. Elton Gas Bar largest GBE with ~$22.6M revenue. Significant short-term borrowing activity ($778.9M advanced, $759.7M repaid) related to claim settlement financing.
notes: Nation is in Manitoba (MB), not AB. Seven GBEs accounted for by modified equity method. Five departments consolidated as subsidiaries. Significant short-term debt activity (~$778.9M advanced and ~$759.7M repaid) related to claim settlement bridge financing secured by assignment of claim settlement funds. Trust settlement income of $7.49M is a non-recurring item related to surrender claim settlement. Net debt position of $72M at year end. TCA net book value not provided in the extracted text (statement of financial position for non-financial assets was not fully included). Deferred revenue balance not fully extracted due to document truncation. CMHC funding of $4,801,998 included in total government transfers. isc_funding is ISC only; total_government_transfers includes ISC + CMHC + First Peoples Development Inc. + Province of Manitoba. osr calculated as total revenue minus government transfers. Pension contributions of $85,104 disclosed.
